_components_rule: components = every installed file carrying a harness: marker, plus copied scripts. Adding or retiring a component updates this list in the same change (audits fail orphans on either side).
_hooks_enabled_rule: hooks.enabled = hook files that MUST be present in .claude/hooks/, wired in settings.json, and plant-passing (tier M and up). The self-test FAILs any enabled hook missing on disk — otherwise a deleted hook whose 'test ! -f'-guarded settings line remains is silent-green. Leave [] at tier S.
